label: Mechanical Engineering
description: Study of mechanical systems, manufacturing, and energy

children.label: Automobile Engineering
children.description: Design, development, and maintenance of vehicles

children.label: Production / Manufacturing Engineering
children.description: Manufacturing processes, production planning, and optimization

children.label: Thermal Engineering
children.description: Heat transfer, thermodynamics, and energy systems

children.label: Design Engineering
children.description: Product design, mechanical design, and engineering drawing

children.label: Mechatronics / Robotics
children.description: Integration of mechanical, electronics, and computer systems

children.label: Industrial Engineering
children.description: Process optimization, productivity improvement, and systems management

children.label: Energy Engineering (Renewable & Conventional)
children.description: Renewable energy, power generation, and energy conservation

children.label: Aerospace Engineering
children.description: Aircraft and spacecraft systems (limited at diploma level)

children.label: Marine Engineering
children.description: Ship machinery, marine propulsion, and offshore systems

children.label: Metallurgical / Materials Engineering
children.description: Metals processing, material properties, and quality testing

children.label: CAD/CAM & Automation
children.description: Computer-aided design, manufacturing, and industrial automation

children.label: Refrigeration & Air Conditioning
children.description: Cooling systems, HVAC design, and cold storage technology
